title: Break-Even Analysis
description: product-spec.md §11.7-§11.11, §13.8. Implements D3 and D4. Only CASH holding cost enters these figures. Slot opportunity cost is imputed and is excluded from every field in this schema -- including it would raise the floor above the dealer's real recovery point and, because §19.1 makes the floor a publication bar, would silently block profitable sales.

current_accounting_break_even.description: §11.7. Costs already incurred or contractually committed as of today. No future costs, no imputed costs.

projected_break_even.description: §11.8. current_accounting_break_even + future cash holding cost through the draw's sale date, computed per draw. DOWNSIDE IS P90.

floors.description: The four inputs to §11.10. policy_price_floor and risk_floor have no MCP source in §10 and are read from config in the MVP (docs/open-questions.md C1).

binding_constraint.description: Which of the four is the maximum, and therefore which one actually constrains the price.

minimum_safe_list_price.description: §11.11. minimum_safe_transaction_price / (1 - expected_discount_rate). A vehicle listed exactly at its minimum safe transaction price transacts BELOW it after normal negotiation.

expected_discount_rate_used.description: D4. A configured assumption, not a calibrated value. Must be surfaced in the UI assumptions panel.

market_value_crossover_risk.description: Whether break-even is above, or projected to rise above, market value -- the underwater condition that triggers the §19.2 loss-minimization path.
